publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-12-11 23:12:03 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Includes bulletins, correspondence, reports, receipts, minutes, bylaws, membership lists, treasurer's reports, class rosters, and other records of the Cornell Society of Hotelmen pertaining to hotel legislation, Cornell University School of Hotel Administration, Society events, and other related topics.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes bulletins, correspondence, reports, receipts, minutes, bylaws, membership lists, treasurer's reports, class rosters, and other records of the Cornell Society of Hotelmen pertaining to hotel legislation, Cornell University School of Hotel Administration, Society events, and other related topics.

odd.head: General
odd.p: See also School of Hotel Administration Photographs and Ephemera, #28-10-4164 for photographs of Hotelmen luncheons (1929, 1930, 1950)

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell Society of Hotelmen. Records, #28-5-1797. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.subject: Hotelkeepers.
Hotel management.
controlaccess.corpname: Cornell University. School of Hotel Administration -- : Societies, etc.

did.unittitle: Form sent to Alumni for information
Form to alumni from Auditing Committee
Lists of those who received Membership Cards
Memos sent to Alumni and Correspondence
Lists of Cornell Hotelmen in the Armed Forces
Minutes of Meetings of the Cornell Charter of Hotel Greeters of America
Report of the Committee to Determine how Alumni can assist Undergraduates
Status of Classes with Respect to Payment of Dues
Meetings of Board of Director's Meetings
Meetings of Board of Director's Meetings
Minutes of Meetings, Reports, Correspondence, By-laws
Report on Examination of Financial Statements
Correspondence includes lists of alumni in the Armed Services
Smoker Files - Committee Files, Correspondence, Programs

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes Fall and Winter issues for 1989 and the Fall issue for 1990

did.unittitle: Thumbnail Sketch of the Origin of the Cornell Society of Hotelmen - by John Courtney
European Chapter Society of Hotelmen 30th Anniversary Book 1961-1991
European Chapter Society of Hotelmen 20th Anniversary Book 1961-1981
Cornellian Council Bulletins (1936-1939)and various other publications
Directory of the Cornell Society of Hotelmen
New York State Hotel Association Bulletins
Correspondence to and from Robert Trier and Publications
Hotelmen Meeting - Address Given by John Crandall
Photographs used in Bulletins of the Cornell Society of Hotelmen
Hotel School History - Correspondence, Memos about the Book Proposed
Alumni Organizational Study for Society's Long-Range Plan
